title: Most Frequent Number Following Key In an Array
titleCn: 数组中紧跟 key 之后出现最频繁的数字

testcases.input: nums = [1,100,200,1,100], key = 1 Output: 100 Explanation: For target = 100, there are 2 occurrences at indices 1 and 4 which follow an occurrence of key. No other integers follow an occurrence of key, so we return 100.
testcases.expectedOutput: 100 Explanation: For target = 100, there are 2 occurrences at indices 1 and 4 which follow an occurrence of key. No other integers follow an occurrence of key, so we return 100.

testcases.input: nums = [2,2,2,2,3], key = 2 Output: 2 Explanation: For target = 2, there are 3 occurrences at indices 1, 2, and 3 which follow an occurrence of key. For target = 3, there is only one occurrence at index 4 which follows an occurrence of key. target = 2 has the maximum number of occurrences following an occurrence of key, so we return 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: For target = 2, there are 3 occurrences at indices 1, 2, and 3 which follow an occurrence of key. For target = 3, there is only one occurrence at index 4 which follows an occurrence of key. target = 2 has the maximum number of occurrences following an occurrence of key, so we return 2.
